$operator.summary: Target-repository verification commands grouped by workflow purpose.
$operator.note: Populate only commands verified from the target repository's own documentation, manifests, executable scripts, or operator instructions. The fast profile is the shortest documented default/primary suite and MUST NOT duplicate full when the repository defines a distinct fast path. Secondary is an optional complementary slow/integration suite. Full is complete verification and may contain multiple commands when the repository exposes no single full-suite command. Use explicit environment entrypoints, add probes that identify runtime/tool versions, and set timeout_ms when the repository documents an expected duration. Empty profiles are reported as not configured and are never replaced with guessed npm, Python, or other technology-specific commands.

static.description: Formatting, lint, type, syntax, or compile-only checks.

fast.description: The shortest documented default or primary automated suite suitable for iterative implementation feedback.

secondary.description: An optional documented complementary suite for slow, integration, model-backed, end-to-end, or otherwise non-default checks.

full.description: Complete documented automated verification, either one full-suite command or the ordered commands needed to cover all suites.
